title: negundo fraxinifolium
intro: Negundo fraxinifolium, also known as Horse Elm or Elm-leaved Neem, is a plant species native to parts of Asia, characterized by its distinctive leaf shape and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Negundo fraxinifolium include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and protect against infection. Negundo fraxinifolium can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to support overall well-being and treat specific health conditions.
